channel.title: Multilingual on Assembler Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Multilingual on Assembler Portfolio

item.title: Hotel Moderno Demonte – Hotel Website
item.description:
🛠️ Overview

Development of the official website for Hotel Moderno Demonte, a mountain hotel located in the heart of Valle Stura (Northern Italy).

The goal of the project was to create a digital presence that feels:

  • welcoming
  • authentic
  • connected to the local territory

The website was built from scratch using Hugo, avoiding traditional CMS platforms in order to ensure:

  • fast loading times
  • a lightweight and stable structure
  • long-term maintainability
  • full control over the codebase

Special attention was given to:

item.title: Assembler Studio
item.description:
🧠 Description

Assembler Studio is the official portfolio website of Assembler Computer, designed to showcase and enhance the web projects developed over time, with a technical, minimal, and user experience-oriented approach.

It’s not just another showcase site, but a structured project that reflects the Assembler workflow:
clarity, full code control, top performance, and functional design.

Built entirely with Hugo, with no pre-made themes, to ensure maximum creative freedom, a solid base, and full scalability.
